_classDateFormat: YY/MM/DD, e.g. 26/05/27 -- fill this in, then ask Claude to apply it to Airtable (renames the Lesson field on all 56 rows to "Rekad 1 - <classDate>")

_sectionsNote: seedOrder/seedAmis show which sentence (by its Order number in lesson-1-airtable-import.csv) currently seeds that section in Airtable. Change seedOrder to a different Order number if you'd rather a different sentence seed that section, then ask Claude to apply it.
